text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Our tumultuous summer camp,<n>marked by
Matikanefukukitaru's<n>mad pursuit of good luck,
has come to<n>a close.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! I had a<n>miraculous
time, thanks to your<n>support!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's one more thing I<n>want to ask you.
I tried plucking<n>flower petals to predict my future a
minute ago.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I will succeed in the Kikuka Sho, "I<n>won't
succeed." You know, that kind<n>of thing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? The last petal<n>told me I'll
succeed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I thought so too... But once I saw the<n>carnage
wrought on the<n>chrysanthemum petals by my
hands,<n>I started to think otherwise...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what's the final result? A good<n>omen or a bad
one? I'm not sure...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We still don't know the answer—but<n>our exciting
and nerve-racking path<n>toward the fall Classics
continues.
